%1 Details:
The %1 payment plugin for Magento simplifies B2B shopping, making it easy and safe for merchants to offer invoices as a payment method.
The payment method lives next to other payment methods in your existing checkout, and offers a variety of configuration options to suit your businesses needs.
If you would like to know more about how to configure the plugin, check out our step by step guide.
%1 Detaljer:
Betalningspluginet %1 för Magento förenklar B2B-shopping, vilket gör det enkelt och säkert för handlare att erbjuda fakturor som betalningsmetod.
Betalningsmetoden finns bredvid andra betalningsmetoder i din befintliga kassa, och erbjuder en mängd olika konfigurationsalternativ för att passa ditt företags behov.
Om du vill veta mer om hur du konfigurerar plugin-programmet, kolla in vår steg-för-steg-guide .

%1 Details: The buyer and the seller are the same company.
%1 Detaljer: Köparen och säljaren är samma företag.

%1 Details: The capture action is not available.

Two is a payment solution for B2B purchases online, allowing you to buy from your favourite merchants and suppliers on trade credit. Using Two, you can access flexible trade credit instantly to make purchasing simple.
%1 Detaljer: Two är en betalningslösning för B2B-köp online, som låter dig köpa från dina favorithandlare och leverantörer på handelskredit. Med Two får du omedelbar tillgång till flexibel handelskredit för att göra inköp enkelt.

%1 Details: Controls the position of this payment method relative to other payment methods at checkout. Lower numbers appear first. Default is empty (no specific order).

%1 Details: Descriptive title which gives the buyer a better understanding of this payment method

%1 Details: Optional field which enables the buyer to register a note to the merchant. The information is eventually displayed on the invoice.

%1 Details: Optional field which enables the buyer to register the department the purchase is connected to. The information is eventually displayed on the invoice.

%1 Details: Select your company from the dropdown to continue.

%1 Details: Surcharge refund must be a valid amount (e.g. 1.50 or 1,50).
%1 Detaljer: Återbetalning av tilläggsavgift måste vara ett giltigt belopp (t.ex. 1.50 eller 1,50).
Återbetalning av tilläggsavgift får inte vara negativ.

%1 Details: Surcharge refund (%1) exceeds the remaining refundable surcharge (%2).
%1 Detaljer: Återbetalning av tilläggsavgift (%1) överstiger den återstående återbetalningsbara tilläggsavgiften (%2).

%1 Details: Select between sandbox and production environment. The sandbox environment is for testing purposes and does not involve real money.

%1 Details: API key for sandbox environment is available on your merchant portal (however please reach out to integration@two.inc for access to production keys).

%1 Details: The debug mode enables writing to the error logs below. Debug mode should only be enabled when the sandbox environment is active

%1 Details: Adds a searchable company name input field on shipping details page where the buyer can select their company from a dropdown menu.

%1 dagar - %2: värdet får inte vara negativt.

%1 Detaljer: Orderuppfyllelse kan utlösas antingen genom att initiera leverans eller genom att skapa en faktura i Magento-administrationen

%1 Details: I accept the %1 and authorize %2 to process my data automatically.

%1 Details: Snap the buyer surcharge line item to a clean increment. Select None for standard two-decimal amounts.

%1 Details: Increment the surcharge is rounded to (e.g. 1 = whole units, 0.50 = nearest half). Must be greater than zero.
